summary: Testing iteration 5 - Protocol translations (guides, templates, examples) for EN/DE. Backend API tests: 17/17 passed. Found and fixed 2 frontend bugs: (1) handleSelectGuide and handleSelectExample were not passing lang parameter, (2) ExampleProtocolDetailView had hardcoded Polish strings and status check only for 'OK' not 'PASS'.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/protocols/guides returns 4 Polish guides by default
Backend: /api/protocols/guides?lang=en returns 4 English guide names
Backend: /api/protocols/guides?lang=de returns 4 German guide names
Backend: /api/protocols/guides/reports_plus_basics?lang=en returns English steps
Backend: /api/protocols/guides/generate_protocol?lang=de returns German steps
Backend: /api/protocols/templates returns 5 Polish templates by default
Backend: /api/protocols/templates?lang=en returns 5 English templates with translated measurements
Backend: /api/protocols/templates?lang=de returns 5 German templates
Backend: /api/protocols/examples returns 5 Polish examples by default
Backend: /api/protocols/examples?lang=en returns 5 English examples with POSITIVE/NEGATIVE
Backend: /api/protocols/examples?lang=de returns 5 German examples with POSITIV/NEGATIV
Backend: /api/protocols/examples/example_reception?lang=en returns English example with Living room, Kitchen
Backend: /api/protocols/examples/example_periodic?lang=de returns German example with Büro, Hauptverteilung
Backend: Invalid lang=fr returns 422 validation error
Backend: Non-existent guide/example returns 404
Frontend EN: Protocols view shows English guide titles
Frontend EN: Guide detail shows English step-by-step instructions (Software installation, Creating a new project)
Frontend EN: Example protocol shows English content (Living room, Kitchen, Bathroom)
Frontend EN: Example shows POSITIVE assessment and 'Pass' status
Frontend EN: Table headers translated (Measurements table, Point, Circuit, Protection, Value, Limit, Status, Notes)
Frontend EN: Recommendations section header translated
Frontend DE: Protocols view shows German guide titles (Grundlagen, Ergebnisse herunterladen, Protokoll erstellen)
Frontend DE: Section headers show SCHRITT-FÜR-SCHRITT-ANLEITUNGEN, BEISPIEL AUSGEFÜLLTER PROTOKOLLE
Frontend DE: Example names show German (Wohnungsabnahmeprotokoll, Periodisches Prüfprotokoll)
No runtime errors in any language

bugs_fixed.issue: Guide detail API call did not pass lang parameter, always returning Polish content
bugs_fixed.fix: Added { params: { lang } } to axios.get for /api/protocols/guides/{guideId}

bugs_fixed.issue: Example detail API call did not pass lang parameter, always returning Polish content
bugs_fixed.fix: Added { params: { lang } } to axios.get for /api/protocols/examples/{exampleId}

bugs_fixed.issue: Hardcoded Polish strings for table headers and section titles (Wyniki pomiarów, Punkt, Obwód, etc.)
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced with t() translation function calls using existing i18n keys

bugs_fixed.issue: Status check only checked for 'OK' but translated data uses 'PASS'
bugs_fixed.fix: Added isStatusPass() helper function that checks for 'OK', 'PASS', or 'BESTANDEN'

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All protocol translation features verified after bug fixes)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data - All protocol translations already in translations.py (GUIDES_EN, GUIDES_DE, TEMPLATES_EN, TEMPLATES_DE, EXAMPLES_EN, EXAMPLES_DE)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Protocol section i18n now fully working. Fixed 2 bugs: (1) API calls for guide/example detail now pass lang parameter, (2) ExampleProtocolDetailView now uses t() translations and handles PASS/OK/BESTANDEN status values. All backend endpoints: /api/protocols/guides, /api/protocols/templates, /api/protocols/examples support ?lang=pl|en|de parameter.
mocked_api_note: ALL protocol translations are hardcoded in translations.py (EN/DE) and server.py (PL default) - this is by design
